name: happy-path-variant-a
task: Audit the file at frontend/src/components/chat/ChatInput.tsx for security and performance issues.
assertions: Response checks for XSS vulnerabilities (e.g., dangerouslySetInnerHTML, unsanitized user input rendered in DOM)
Response checks for unnecessary re-renders or missing React optimization (useMemo, useCallback, React.memo)
Response checks for proper cleanup of event listeners or subscriptions (e.g., in useEffect return functions)
Response explicitly states whether any `any` types are used and flags them if found
Response organizes findings by category (Security, Performance, TypeScript Quality, or similar groupings) rather than a flat unstructured list
